title: dissotis cogniauxiana
intro: Dissotis cogniauxiana, also known as the yellow dissotis or Cogniaux's dissotis, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to tropical Africa, particularly in the regions of Cameroon, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, and the Republic of the Congo. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dissotis cogniauxiana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in water.
